user.title: Connect to a Felicity Solar battery
user.description: Enter the local IP address of the battery's WiFi module. It's queried over TCP on the local network - no cloud account needed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the battery. Check the IP address and that it's reachable on your network.
error.timeout: The battery did not respond in time.
error.invalid_response: The battery responded, but not with a valid/usable snapshot.

data_description.persistent_connection: Keep the TCP connection to the battery open between updates instead of reconnecting every time (this is the default). Allows much faster polling (down to 5s) at the cost of holding a socket open on the battery's WiFi module; the OS is asked to probe the connection while idle so a dropped connection is still detected between polls.

error.interval_too_low_for_one_shot: Update interval must be at least 10 seconds unless "Keep connection open" is enabled (which allows down to 5 seconds).
